issues.description: Effect structure is incorrect. The card text describes: (1) optional trash 1 from hand AND rest this Stage as cost, (2) look at top 3 of deck, (3) reveal and add up to 1 GERMA card, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL uses SearchDeck with cost filter instead of implementing the actual 'look at 3' mechanic with type-based reveal and reorder functionality.
TrashFromHand should be conditional (optional 'may'). Current DSL does not reflect the optional nature of the trash cost.

SearchDeck with maxCost:3 filter is fundamentally wrong. The effect requires filtering by type 'GERMA', not by cost. Additionally, the full mechanic of 'look at 3 cards, reveal up to 1 GERMA, reorder rest at bottom' cannot be represented by a simple SearchDeck action and requires a more complex sequence.
Missing the 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' reordering mechanic. Current DSL has no action to handle deck reordering after card selection.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may trash 1 card from your hand and rest this Stage: Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 card with a type including "GERMA" and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
